'''Bortrek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of the [[Pure Sabacc (starship)|''Pure Sabacc'']].

==Biography==
After the rebellion on [[Durren]] he stole several of their artifacts to be sold to [[Sandro]] the Hook. He also came across the lifeboat that [[Marcopius]] had used to escape the [[Borealis (cruiser)|''Borealis'']], where he unceremoniously dumped his body out of the airlock and stole the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. He dismantled R2's legs and used him as a [[Navigation computer/Legends|navicomputer]], and used 3PO to appraise what he had stolen. He later got drunk and passed out when R2 lowered the oxygen content onboard the ''Pure Sabacc''. After taking over the ship, he was coerced to take 3PO and R2 to [[Nim Drovis]], where he dropped them off. He also had an ex-wife.

{{Char-stub}}
